title: Skill Discovery Boundary
brief: A technical flowchart showing Hermes skill discovery and collision handling. Top section: recursive scanner finds SKILL.md files but skips support directories (references, templates, assets, scripts) marked with dashed forbidden signs. Middle section: skill_view() lookup logic tries direct path first, then matches by skill name, and when multiple skills share the same name returns an ambiguity warning listing all candidate paths. Bottom section: slash command generated from frontmatter name. Use dashed containers and soft tech diagram style, clean layout, bilingual Chinese-English labels.
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled 'Skill Discovery Boundary'. Diagram type: WeChat article cover. Use a soft technical diagram, subtle dashed containers, layered modules, light academic visual language. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: doc-hd. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
A technical flowchart showing Hermes skill discovery and collision handling. Top section: recursive scanner finds SKILL.md files but skips support directories (references, templates, assets, scripts) marked with dashed forbidden signs. Middle section: skill_view() lookup logic tries direct path first, then matches by skill name, and when multiple skills share the same name returns an ambiguity warning listing all candidate paths. Bottom section: slash command generated from frontmatter name. Use dashed containers and soft tech diagram style, clean layout, bilingual Chinese-English labels.
